signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks in Pakistan Before April 22 Ceasefire Expires; Trump Signals Negotiations in Next 2 Days |
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks in Pakistan Before April 22 Ceasefire Expires; Trump Signals Negotiations in Next 2 Days | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

The US and Iran are eyeing another round of negotiations after inconclusive talks in Islamabad, aiming to hold them before the two-week ceasefire—announced April 7—expires next week, amid a US blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz pressu

signals.headline: Germany:** Inflation confirmed at **2
signals.raw: Germany:** Inflation confirmed at **2.7% in March 2026**[1][4], announced April 10, 2026. This was driven by sharp energy price increases (7.2%) following the Iran conflict, marking the highest level since January 2024[4]. GDP growth forecasts for 2026 were significantly lowered to +0.6% to +1.2%[3].

signals.headline: South Korea:** Inflation rose to **2
signals.raw:
South Korea:** Inflation rose to **2.2% in March 2026**[2], below market forecasts of 2.4%. The Bank of Korea raised its inflation outlook for 2026 to 2.2% and held its policy rate steady at 2.5%[2]. GDP growth for 2026 is projected at 1.8%[9].

These announcements (from early-to-mid April 2026) already reflect market expectations and recent geopolitical developments (the Iran conflict). To identi

signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders & 148M Daily Non-Vote Transactions on April 14, 2026 | YES | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders & 148M Daily Non-Vote Transactions on April 14, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This breaking network milestone, reported as of April 14, coincides with a 10% SOL price surge and robust institutional ETF holdings from BlackRock and Fidelity, amid anticipation for the Alpenglow upgrade targeting 150ms transaction finality[1].

signals.headline: Solana Stablecoin Supply Reaches Record $16
signals.raw:
Solana Stablecoin Supply Reaches Record $16.3B, Overtaking Ethereum in Adjusted Volume for 2nd Time | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Data ending April 12 shows Solana at 32.6% weekly adjusted stablecoin volume share vs. Ethereum's 27.8%, with fastest supply growth (+10.87% in 7 days) among top chains, signaling structural DeFi shift[2].

signals.headline: Solana Economic Activity Surges to $1
signals.raw:
Solana Economic Activity Surges to $1.1T in Q1 2026, Up 6,500% QoQ | YES | MED confidence**  
On-chain data from Artemis confirms historic rebound in transactions, DeFi, and staking, driving network adoption despite market volatility (reported April 14)[5].  

No confirmed announcements directly reference Ethereum beyond Solana outperformance in stablecoins[2]; general April bullish momentum noted
